## QA Checklist
- [ ] Link integrity check (No broken links, correct CTA)
- [ ] Visual inspection (Neobrutalism style matches, mobile responsiveness)
- [ ] Content check (No fake claims, correct tone, disclaimers present)
- [ ] Code check (No secrets, clean HTML/CSS)
